chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 20 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 17.04.2023 Mr. Ghulam Hassan Shah, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Niazuddin N. Memon, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Shah, Advocate for respondent No.1, placed on record through statement certain documents; copies whereof are supplied to learned Counsel for the applicant, who, after going through the same, seeks disposal of this petition by directing to learned trial Court i.e. Additional Sessions Judge-II, Khairpur to decide Sessions Case No.406 of 2022 (Re: The State versus Ghulam Mustafa Shar and others) expeditiously and preferably within a period of one month by recording evidence of remaining prosecution witnesses. Order accordingly. Instant Criminal Transfer Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
